title: Setup
approval_banner: Some changes in this section require Owner approval.
readonly_banner: You have read-only access to Setup. Editing requires CFO or Senior Accountant role.

chart.title: Chart of Accounts
chart.description: Manage GL accounts organized by type.

account_modal.immutable_note: Code and type cannot be changed after creation.
account_modal.approval_warning: Creating a top-level account requires Owner approval.

deactivate_modal.label: DEACTIVATE ACCOUNT
deactivate_modal.title: Deactivate account
deactivate_modal.warning_balance: This account has a non-zero balance. Deactivation requires Owner approval.
deactivate_modal.warning_activity: This account has recent activity — verify before deactivating.

fiscal.title: Fiscal Year
fiscal.description: Current fiscal year, period locks, and upcoming milestones.
fiscal.change_fy_warning: Changing the fiscal year start affects all historical data. Owner approval required.

tax.title: Statutory Rates
tax.description: Statutory tax, Zakat, and social-contribution rates, accounts, and exemptions.

currencies.title: Currencies
currencies.description: Base currency and enabled foreign currencies.

apply_template_modal.label: ROLE TEMPLATE
apply_template_modal.title: Apply role template
apply_template_modal.warning: This will overwrite all current permissions for this member.

disallowance.title: Disallowance Rules
disallowance.description: Kuwait CIT disallowance-rule register. Rules tag expense lines as partially or fully non-deductible during the tax pipeline.
disallowance.empty_description: Add a rule so the tax engine can automatically tag non-deductible expenses against this tenant's CIT base.

disallowance_modal.rule_type_immutable_note: Rule type is fixed once the rule is saved. Deactivate and create a new rule to change it.
disallowance_modal.target_immutable_note: Target is fixed once the rule is saved. Deactivate and create a new rule to change it.
disallowance_modal.error_percent_range: Disallowed percent must be a whole number between 0 and 100.
disallowance_modal.error_target_role_required: Account role is required when target mode is role.
disallowance_modal.error_active_until_before_from: Active until cannot be earlier than active from.
disallowance_modal.error_generic: Failed to save rule. Please try again.

tax_lodgement.title: Tax Lodgements
tax_lodgement.description: Record every tax return filed with a Kuwaiti authority (CIT, WHT, VAT, KFAS, NLST, Zakat) and confirm it ties out to the ledger.
tax_lodgement.empty_description: Record a filing to track it against the ledger and keep the auditor's trail complete.
tax_lodgement.tie_out_status_TIE_OK: TIE OK — filed amount matches GL within tolerance
tax_lodgement.tie_out_status_VARIANCE: VARIANCE — filed amount differs from GL
tax_lodgement.tie_out_status_NO_GL_ACCOUNT: NO GL ACCOUNT — role exists but no account mapped
tax_lodgement.tie_out_status_SKIPPED: SKIPPED — no GL role set on this lodgement

tax_lodgement_modal.filing_reference_placeholder: e.g. CIT-2025-0001 or portal ack number
tax_lodgement_modal.gl_role_hint: Leave blank to skip tie-out. Populated values match the AccountRole written by the four-levy or AP payment pipeline.
tax_lodgement_modal.error_period_required: Both period from and period to are required.
tax_lodgement_modal.error_period_order: Period to cannot be earlier than period from.
tax_lodgement_modal.error_amount_format: Filed amount must be a non-negative decimal with up to 3 decimal places (KWD).
tax_lodgement_modal.error_generic: Failed to record lodgement. Please try again.

cit_assessment.title: CIT Assessments
cit_assessment.description: Track every Kuwait CIT case through its lifecycle: filed → under review → assessed → (objected →) final → closed. Statute-of-limitations is surfaced so nothing slips past the authority's window.
cit_assessment.empty_description: Start a case the day you file the return. Track the authority's review, any objection, and the final assessment here so the audit trail never drifts.

cit_assessment_modal.error_fiscal_year_range: Fiscal year must be between 2000 and 2100.
cit_assessment_modal.error_amount_format: Amount must be a decimal with up to 3 decimal places (negative values allowed for refunds).
cit_assessment_modal.error_authority_case_required: Authority case number is required to open review.

wht.policy_description: Effective-dated per-category basis-point rates. Rates are frozen at creation — to change a rate, deactivate the current policy and add a new one.
wht.empty_policy_description: Configure per-category rates so the AP flow can auto-deduct withholding when this tenant pays qualifying vendors.
wht.certificates_description: Read-only register. Certificates are issued automatically when the AP-flow splice posts a WHT-qualifying payment.
wht.empty_certificates_description: The AP-flow splice will populate this register as withholding-qualifying payments post. No certificate is issued below the policy's minimum threshold.

wht_modal.rates_heading: Rates by category (leave blank to disable category)
wht_modal.rate_hint_service: Typical Kuwait service WHT rate is 5%.
wht_modal.rate_hint_professional: Typical Kuwait professional WHT rate is 5%.
wht_modal.threshold_hint: Payments below this gross amount are exempt from withholding. Leave blank for no threshold.
wht_modal.rates_immutable_note: Rates are frozen on an existing policy. Only notes and the active-until date can be edited here. To change rates, deactivate this policy and add a new one.
wht_modal.error_rate_format: Rates must be numbers between 0 and 100 with up to 2 decimal places.
wht_modal.error_threshold_format: Minimum threshold must be a non-negative decimal with up to 3 decimal places (KWD).
wht_modal.error_active_until_after_from: Active-until must be strictly after active-from.
wht_modal.error_at_least_one_rate: Set at least one category rate.

cost_allocation.title: Cost Allocation
cost_allocation.description: Shared-overhead allocation rules. Each rule names a source account and an ordered list of (cost-center label, weight) targets. Rules are immutable after create — deactivate and replace to change.
cost_allocation.empty_description: Add a rule to spread a shared-overhead account balance across cost centers by any driver (headcount, floor space, revenue percentage, etc.).

alloc_modal.source_hint: The account whose period balance will be split across the cost centers below.
alloc_modal.targets_hint: Weights are normalized to 100% at compute time. Minimum 1, maximum 50 targets.
alloc_modal.error_targets_required: At least one target with a label and weight is required.
alloc_modal.error_weight_format: Each weight must be a positive decimal.
alloc_modal.error_active_until_after_from: Active-until must be strictly after active-from.

related_party.title: Related Parties
related_party.description: IAS 24 related-party register and period transaction report. Register entries drive disclosure notes and enable the report to aggregate bills + invoices against related counterparties.
related_party.empty_description: Register every related party (parent, subsidiary, associate, key management personnel, or close family member) so IAS 24 disclosures can be generated and the transaction report can aggregate automatically.
related_party.report_empty: No related-party transactions in the selected period.

rp_modal.counterparty_immutable_note: Counterparty is fixed after registration. To point at a different party, deactivate this entry and register a new one.
rp_modal.disclosure_placeholder: Public-facing IAS 24 disclosure text for this relationship.
rp_modal.error_active_until_after_from: Active-until must be strictly after active-from.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Vendor master with KYC fields (CR number, expiry, civil ID, KYC notes). The CR-expiry chip flags vendors whose commercial registration has lapsed or expires within 30 days.
vendors.search_placeholder: Search by name, email, CR number, or civil ID
vendors.empty_description: Add a vendor to start tracking commercial registration, civil ID, and KYC notes. Backend posts to /api/vendors (Owner or Accountant required).

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Customer master with KYC fields (CR number, expiry, civil ID, KYC notes). The CR-expiry chip flags customers whose commercial registration has lapsed or expires within 30 days.
customers.search_placeholder: Search by name, email, CR number, or civil ID
customers.empty_description: Add a customer to start tracking commercial registration, civil ID, and KYC notes. Backend posts to /api/customers (Owner or Accountant required).

kyc_modal.section_kyc_description: Commercial registration and identity fields. Each field is optional; leave blank to clear.
kyc_modal.field_kyc_notes_placeholder: Internal notes for compliance + audit trail.
kyc_modal.warn_expiry_in_past: Heads up: expiry date is on or before today — flagged as expired in the list.
kyc_modal.error_name_too_long: Name (English) must be 200 characters or fewer.
kyc_modal.error_name_ar_too_long: Arabic name must be 200 characters or fewer.
kyc_modal.error_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
kyc_modal.error_phone_too_long: Phone must be 30 characters or fewer.
kyc_modal.error_cr_number_too_long: CR number must be 50 characters or fewer.
kyc_modal.error_civil_id_too_long: Civil ID must be 50 characters or fewer.
kyc_modal.error_notes_too_long: KYC notes must be 2000 characters or fewer.
kyc_modal.error_issued_after_expiry: CR issued date must be on or before CR expiry date.

warranty.title: Warranty Provision Policy
warranty.description: Per-tenant effective-dated warranty accrual policy. Applies mostly to trading companies selling warrantied goods. The future period-end accrual runner consumes the active policy to post IAS-37-compliant provision JEs.
warranty.empty_description: Configure a warranty provision policy so the future accrual runner can book IAS-37-compliant provisions at period-end. Most tenants use a simple revenue-percentage basis (e.g. 2% of warrantied-goods revenue).

warranty_modal.basis_hint_REVENUE_PERCENT: Accrual = ratePercent × period revenue. Typical Kuwait trading-company rate is 1–3% of warrantied-goods revenue.
warranty_modal.basis_hint_PER_UNIT: Accrual = fixed KWD amount × units sold in period. Used when per-unit repair cost is known (e.g. whitegoods, electronics).
warranty_modal.rates_immutable_note: Basis + rate are frozen on an existing policy. Only role codes, notes, and active-until can be edited. To change the rate, deactivate this policy and add a new one.
warranty_modal.role_hint: AccountRole codes that resolve to the tenant's warranty-expense (P&L) and warranty-liability accounts. Consult CoA if unsure.
warranty_modal.error_rate_required: Rate is required for revenue-percent basis.
warranty_modal.error_rate_positive: Rate must be greater than zero.
warranty_modal.error_per_unit_required: Per-unit amount is required for per-unit basis.
warranty_modal.error_per_unit_positive: Per-unit amount must be greater than zero.
warranty_modal.error_active_until_after_from: Active-until must be strictly after active-from.

bank_formats.title: Bank Statement Formats
bank_formats.description: Per-bank statement-parsing format registry. Effective-dated specs feed the statement-upload parser pipeline. Specs are immutable post-create — deactivate and add a new version to change.
bank_formats.empty_description: Register a parsing spec per bank + format version. The statement-upload pipeline looks up the active spec for the matching bankCode to know how to parse each uploaded statement.
bank_formats.error_load: Failed to load bank format specs.

bank_format_modal.spec_immutable_note: bankCode, formatVersion, formatType, and the spec JSON are frozen after creation. Only effectiveUntil and notes can be edited. To change the parser spec, deactivate this version and add a new one.
bank_format_modal.spec_hint: Arbitrary JSON consumed by the parser for this bank + format. Typical keys: columns, delimiter, dateFormat, headerRows, encoding.
bank_format_modal.error_spec_not_object: Spec must be a JSON object (not array or primitive).
bank_format_modal.error_until_after_from: Effective-until must be strictly after effective-from.

leave.summary_description: Aggregate leave-accrual liability across all employees as of today. Consumed by period-end close to verify ledger balance matches the register.
leave.policy_description: Effective-dated policy driving monthly leave accrual JEs. Accrual rate + qualifying period + carry-forward cap are frozen at creation.
leave.empty_description: Configure a leave accrual policy so the future month-end runner can book IAS-19-style leave-liability provisions automatically.

leave_modal.rates_immutable_note: Accrual rate, qualifying months, max carry-forward, and role codes are frozen on an existing policy. Only notes and active-until can be edited. To change the rate, deactivate this policy and add a new one.
leave_modal.accrual_hint: Typical Kuwait private-sector accrual is 2.5 days/month (30 days/year). Up to 4 decimal places accepted.
leave_modal.error_accrual_positive: Accrual days per month must be a positive decimal (up to 4 dp).
leave_modal.error_qualifying_integer: Qualifying months must be a non-negative integer.
leave_modal.error_carry_integer: Max carry-forward must be a non-negative integer.
leave_modal.error_role_required: Both P&L and Liability AccountRole codes are required.
leave_modal.error_active_until_after_from: Active-until must be strictly after active-from.

cbk_rates.staleness_description: Latest CBK rate per common currency + age in days. Rates older than 7 days are flagged. Manual entry only — no auto-refresh.
cbk_rates.stale_banner: {{count}} currency/currencies have stale rates (>7 days old)
cbk_rates.title: CBK Rate Register
cbk_rates.description: Central Bank of Kuwait exchange-rate register. Upserts are keyed on (currency, rateDate). Consumed by FX revaluation and bilingual reports.
cbk_rates.empty_description: Enter exchange rates as they are published by the Central Bank of Kuwait. The register is keyed on (currency, date) — re-entering for the same pair updates the rate.

cbk_modal.label: CBK RATE
cbk_modal.title: Add / replace CBK rate
cbk_modal.upsert_hint: Upsert by (currency, date): re-entering a value for an existing pair replaces it.
cbk_modal.rate_hint: Up to 8 decimal places. Example: 1 USD = 0.30600 KWD.
cbk_modal.source_hint: Only MANUAL is supported in this release. CBK_SCHEDULED and BANK_EMBEDDED are reserved for a future scheduled-fetcher dispatch.
cbk_modal.error_currency_format: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO 4217 code (e.g. USD).
cbk_modal.error_rate_format: Rate must be a positive decimal with up to 8 decimal places.
cbk_modal.error_rate_positive: Rate must be greater than zero.
